mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO coupon_log ( coupon_id, user_id, order_no, change_type, change_amount, deduct_amount, waste_amount, before_available_amount, after_available_amount, source_type, source_biz_no, remark, operator_id, create_time, is_deleted ) SELECT uc.id, uc.user_id, NULL, #{changeType}, 0, 0, 0, COALESCE(uc.available_amount, 0), COALESCE(uc.available_amount, 0), #{sourceType}, CAST(uc.id AS CHAR), #{remark}, #{operatorId}, #{createTime}, 0 FROM user_coupon uc WHERE uc.is_deleted = 0 AND uc.coupon_status = #{fromStatus} AND uc.update_by = #{operatorId} AND uc.update_time = #{createTime} AND uc.id IN
#{couponId}
